title: Ruby Red Diamonds
description: replaces diamond textures with a ruby red, or blood red.
body:
Remember when rubies were planned to be into the game?
I dont, but I decided to turn diamonds into them.

- Replaces everything diamond with a deep red, no more blue!




[>>>> BASIC WEAPONS PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-diamonds-basic-weapons)

for those who have the basic weapons mod should also get this resource pack to make them red.
